articles.title: Hampton Beach shooting suspect dead; two injured
articles.description:
Two people were injured, and another died after gunfire broke out early Sunday morning in Hampton Beach.

The post Hampton Beach shooting suspect dead; two injured appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gunfire erupted early Sunday morning, injuring two and killing the suspect at Hampton Beach.
The incident occurred on July 6, 2026, raising safety concerns for local residents.
Local authorities are increasing patrols to enhance safety in the Hampton Beach area.

articles.title: Across the Great Divide: Every Noah Kahan song ranked from worst to best
articles.description:
Ahead of the Vermont singer-songwriter’s summer shows at Fenway Park, here’s every Noah Kahan song ranked.

The post Across the Great Divide: Every Noah Kahan song ranked from worst to best appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Noah Kahan will perform at Fenway Park this summer, attracting local fans.
The article ranks all of Kahan's songs, providing insights for concertgoers.
Residents can prepare for the shows by familiarizing themselves with Kahan's music.

articles.title: Historic island house on 25 acres in Maine hits market
articles.description:
It's accessible only by boat and is being sold furnished.

The post Historic island house on 25 acres in Maine hits market appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Historic island house on 25 acres in Maine is now for sale.
The property is accessible only by boat and comes furnished.
Boston residents may consider it for vacation or investment opportunities.

articles.title: Red Sox pitcher Ranger Suarez leaves 7-5 win over Angels because of injury
articles.description:
“The training staff wants to see how I feel tomorrow and the next day, and then we’ll make a decision on where we go from there.”

The post Red Sox pitcher Ranger Suarez leaves 7-5 win over Angels because of injury appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ranger Suarez exited the game after the Red Sox's 7-5 victory over the Angels.
Suarez's injury status will be evaluated by the training staff in the coming days.
His potential absence could affect the Red Sox's pitching rotation in upcoming games.

articles.title: England hands Mexico its first World Cup loss at Estadio Azteca, winning 3-2 to reach quarterfinals
articles.description:
“The best night of my England career.”

The post England hands Mexico its first World Cup loss at Estadio Azteca, winning 3-2 to reach quarterfinals appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: England defeated Mexico 3-2 at Estadio Azteca, marking Mexico's first World Cup loss.
This victory advances England to the quarterfinals of the World Cup.
Local fans in Boston celebrate England's success, boosting interest in upcoming matches.
